testcase.name: TC-AUTH-01: valid credentials redirect to authenticated area

failure.message: auth.spec.ts:135:1 TC-AUTH-01: valid credentials redirect to authenticated area

testcase.failure: [chromium] › auth.spec.ts:135:1 › TC-AUTH-01: valid credentials redirect to authenticated area ─── Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: locator('a[href="/locations"]').first() Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 8000ms Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 8000ms - waiting for locator('a[href="/locations"]').first() 11 × locator resolved to … - unexpected value "hidden" 148 | 149 | // Navbar nav links only render when data.user is truthy — confirms session created > 150 | await expect(page.locator(SEL.navLocations).first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 8_000 }); | ^ 151 | }); 152 | 153 | // ============================================================================= at C:\Users\a.eraly\AdventureLog\frontend\qa\test-cases\e2e\auth.spec.ts:150:56 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\reports\test-results\auth-TC-AUTH-01-valid-cred-36738-irect-to-authenticated-area-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\reports\test-results\auth-TC-AUTH-01-valid-cred-36738-irect-to-authenticated-area-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: TC-AUTH-02: wrong password shows alert-error and stays on /login
TC-AUTH-05: both fields empty stays on /login
TC-AUTH-06: authenticated user sees Locations, Collections and Map in navbar

failure.message: auth.spec.ts:219:1 TC-AUTH-06: authenticated user sees Locations, Collections and Map in navbar

testcase.failure: [chromium] › auth.spec.ts:219:1 › TC-AUTH-06: authenticated user sees Locations, Collections and Map in navbar Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: locator('a[href="/locations"]').first() Expected: visible Received: hidden Timeout: 8000ms Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 8000ms - waiting for locator('a[href="/locations"]').first() 11 × locator resolved to … - unexpected value "hidden" 222 | await loginAs(page); 223 | > 224 | await expect(page.locator(SEL.navLocations).first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 8_000 }); | ^ 225 | await expect(page.locator(SEL.navCollections).first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 8_000 }); 226 | await expect(page.locator(SEL.navMap).first()).toBeVisible({ timeout: 8_000 }); 227 | }); at C:\Users\a.eraly\AdventureLog\frontend\qa\test-cases\e2e\auth.spec.ts:224:56 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\reports\test-results\auth-TC-AUTH-06-authentica-c877d-llections-and-Map-in-navbar-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\reports\test-results\auth-TC-AUTH-06-authentica-c877d-llections-and-Map-in-navbar-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: TC-AUTH-07: logout via Avatar dropdown redirects to login or home
TC-AUTH-08: unauthenticated user visiting /locations is redirected to /login
TC-AUTH-09: unauthenticated user visiting /collections is redirected to /login
TC-AUTH-10: signup page loads with all six required input fields
TC-AUTH-11: mismatched passwords on signup shows alert-error
TC-AUTH-12: duplicate username on signup shows alert-error
TC-AUTH-13: login page Signup link navigates to /signup
TC-AUTH-14: login page Forgot Password link navigates to /user/reset-password
TC-AUTH-15: signup page Login link navigates back to /login
